meta.summary: MEME Suite 5.5.9 command-line runtime for motif discovery, motif scanning, motif enrichment, and motif comparison workflows. Large external motif, sequence, GOMo, and T-Gene databases are managed outside the image.
meta.description: MEME Suite 5.5.9 command-line runtime for motif discovery, motif scanning, motif enrichment, and motif comparison workflows. Large external motif, sequence, GOMo, and T-Gene databases are managed outside the image.

test: test -d /opt/conda/share/meme-5.5.9 && test -s /opt/meme-suite/share/licenses/meme-suite/COPYING && grep -F 'source_sha256=0406fb7b1dc27f6aab3d6d3a29ecdf617bbdd946690cfa97ca2129bc210bfd12' /opt/meme-suite/share/doc/source.txt >/dev/null && (meme -h 2>&1 || true) | grep -F 'Usage:' >/dev/null && (tomtom -h 2>&1 || true) | grep -F 'Usage:' >/dev/null && (streme --help 2>&1 || true) | grep -F 'Usage:' >/dev/null && (ame -h 2>&1 || true) | grep -F 'Usage:' >/dev/null && gs --version >/dev/null && curl --version >/dev/null

perl -e 'use XML::Parser; use JSON; print "meme perl deps ok\n"' | grep -Fx 'meme perl deps ok' >/dev/null && python -c 'print("meme python ok")' | grep -Fx 'meme python ok' >/dev/null && meme-suite-db-info | grep -F 'MEME Suite database boundary' >/dev/null && meme-suite-db-info | grep -F 'https://meme-suite.org/meme-software/index.html' >/dev/null && meme-suite-download-dbs --help | grep -F 'Download selected official MEME Suite database bundles' >/dev/null && meme-suite-download-dbs --dry-run --motif | grep -F 'motif_databases.12.27.tgz' >/dev/null

set -e; tmp=/tmp/taf-meme-suite-fimo-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; fimo --oc "$tmp/fimo" --thresh 1e-3 /opt/meme-suite/share/testdata/smoke.meme /opt/meme-suite/share/testdata/smoke.fa > "$tmp/fimo.log" 2>&1; test -s "$tmp/fimo/fimo.tsv"; grep -F 'SMOKE_MOTIF' "$tmp/fimo/fimo.tsv" >/dev/null; grep -F 'smoke_seq_1' "$tmp/fimo/fimo.tsv" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

set -e; tmp=/tmp/taf-meme-suite-tomtom-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; tomtom -oc "$tmp/tomtom" /opt/meme-suite/share/testdata/smoke.meme /opt/meme-suite/share/testdata/smoke.meme > "$tmp/tomtom.log" 2>&1; test -s "$tmp/tomtom/tomtom.tsv"; grep -F 'SMOKE_MOTIF' "$tmp/tomtom/tomtom.tsv" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

set -e; tmp=/tmp/taf-meme-suite-meme-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; meme /opt/meme-suite/share/testdata/smoke_discovery.fa -dna -mod zoops -nmotifs 1 -minw 6 -maxw 6 -oc "$tmp/meme" -nostatus > "$tmp/meme.log" 2>&1; test -s "$tmp/meme/meme.txt"; grep -F 'MEME' "$tmp/meme/meme.txt" >/dev/null; grep -F 'MOTIF' "$tmp/meme/meme.txt" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: MEME Suite
upstream.license: MEME Suite non-commercial educational/research/non-profit license; commercial use requires a separate UCSD license
upstream.citation: Bailey et al. 2015, The MEME Suite; Bailey et al. 2009, MEME SUITE: tools for motif discovery and searching
